title: lathyrus angulatus subsp. sphaericus
intro: Lathyrus angulatus subsp. sphaericus is a subspecies of the annual or biennial vetch plant, known for its ability to thrive in a variety of environments and its unique characteristics such as having a spherical shape. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus angulatus subsp. sphaericus include potential treatments for digestive issues, cardiovascular problems, and respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to help manage stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and improve immune function.
